task: Fill exactly three Korean search queries in the query array for each item. Set query[0] to a sparse lay keyword query: a short list of 2-4 natural terms that a general user might actually type. Use plain everyday wording where possible. Avoid unnatural bureaucratic phrasing, over-structured expert terms, exact document titles, program names, acronyms, and document-type labels unless they are clearly ordinary user vocabulary. Set query[1] to a general-public tip-of-the-tongue natural-language query: the user describes the needed document or situation with more context, but still without necessarily knowing the exact document title, program name, acronym, product name, or official term. Set query[2] to a title-keyword query that preserves the key nouns, target group, official terms, acronyms, program names, and useful document-type words that appear in concat. For query[2], remove list numbers, sequence numbers, bullet numbers, section numbers, publication years, date/month markers, issue numbers, and decorative punctuation that do not help retrieval. Keep numbers only when removing them would break the meaning of a named entity, such as a law/standard name, model name, chemical name, measurement, or official identifier. Generate all queries from concat, using the title as the primary source and the summary only as context when the title is ambiguous. Do not invent facts not supported by concat. Preserve record_id and concat unchanged. Return valid JSON only.

items.concat:
[TITLE] (스리랑카)높은 장소 작업 사망사고 유발 고위험요인(SIF)
[SUMMARY] 사망사고 유발 고위험요인(SIF) 17종을 17개국 언어로 번역한 OPS 자료입니다.

[SUMMARY] 사망사고 유발 고위험요인(SIF) 17종을 17개국 언어로 번역한 OPS 자료입니다.
query: 라오스 상하차 화물 사고
라오스 언어로 화물을 싣고 내리거나 쌓아둔 화물 때문에 생기는 사고 위험 자료
라오스 적재된 화물 상하차 작업 사망사고 유발 고위험요인 SIF OPS
